name: standards-refresh.sh rejects a project id carrying path separators or other unsafe characters with a usage error
command: OUT=/tmp/cl564-r58-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf 'sources: []\n' > $OUT/reg.yaml && cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --project '../escape' 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'project id may only contain' e.err && echo unsafe-project-id-rejected 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
